jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - PropEquity - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
PropEquity, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PropEquity:
PropEquity is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropEquity!
